title: he seems keen on talking to God so I figured—
content:
he seems keen on talking to God so I figured—

Mark
i said what I said, then HE said from my mouth to God’s ears. I don’t give a fuck what God hears

Hunter
He needs to speak to you more than any of us—

Mark
I will put my search history and fifty bucks I don’t have against any single one of you here.

Chris
okay okay, from God’s mouth to any of our ears.

Mark
Just not mine.

Enrique
I’m sure He’s got plenty of words. Keeps em to himself it seems...

Hunter
How so?

Chris
How so?

Hunter
Yeah...how so?

Dan
You mean why so. How is not a conversation we can have. Why, However, is one we can entertain.

Chris
If we took what Mark said, then also took that there was a God, or THE god, then it comes down basically to why would we want to give suggestions limited by our human scope to a divine omnipotent being? If anything, we want the omnipotent being to send us the blueprints so we can get a better sense of what’s what.
context: From document: God‘s Ears (First Draft) — chunk 2 (chunk 2/3)
